text:
below is the dmesg output of my box about the acpi error :

ACPI-1304: *** Error: Method execution failed [\\_TZ_.THRM._TMP] (Node 0xc4b3ca60), AE_AML_NO_RETURN_VALUE
    ACPI-1304: *** Error: Method execution failed [\\_TZ_.THRM._TMP] (Node 0xc4b3ca60), AE_AML_NO_RETURN_VALUE
    ACPI-1304: *** Error: Method execution failed [\\_TZ_.THRM._TMP] (Node 0xc4b3ca60), AE_AML_NO_RETURN_VALUE

My box can't power off directly.
Ether I load the acpi as a module or compile it into the kernel 

My Hardware is :
PD930
1G RAM
Abit AW8D (intel 975)

How-To-Repeat: 
Ether I load the acpi as a module or compile it into the kernel 
 the msg is here.
